reviews.review_title: Good but needs a bit of adjustment
reviews.review_description:
I think this little game is excellent value for money and I’m enjoying it.
However, if like me you have to sit to play games then this one might not be for you. It needs a height adjustment really. I’m having to crouch to get things off a table and to operate things like the gramophone as when I’m standing I’m well above the table. 
Good little game but not overly long. Good for the price.
